authoritative_calendar_source.external_xnys_library: NON-GOVERNING DIAGNOSTIC ONLY (not installed for governance)

boundary: Validation/OOS SEALED AND UNREAD; no development/validation/OOS performance computed; performance interpretation + production promotion NOT AUTHORIZED.

open_convention_for_v1.0_final.governing_default: 6 (next-open exit after 5 held sessions; faithful to frozen 'next-open execution' applying to the exit ladder)
open_convention_for_v1.0_final.status: RC1 governs with 6; owner ratification of the endpoint convention promotes RC1 -> v1.0-final

D-BENCH.detail: Primary return = daily net portfolio return on fixed $10M NAV; benchmark return = 0; primary excess return = daily net portfolio return. ALL cash interest, short financing, borrow fees, execution costs, and financing effects are already included in net P&L. NOT a risk-free accrual series (removed the cash-zero/risk-free conflation).

D-COST.detail: Frozen values retained (10 bps/side, 50 bps/yr borrow @360, $10M NAV, 2% ADV clip-never-delay, 1.5% new-entry cap, next-open execution, no forward-fill). Before ANY validation access the evaluator qualification MUST bind: cost-model source file + git blob + sha256 + version + commit + tree + container digest + dependency lock + synthetic fixture evidence. PENDING_EVALUATOR_BIND is FORBIDDEN in v1.0-final.

D-NI.detail: Non-inferiority overlay NOT added. Frozen absolute-OOS structure retained: validation supplies positive-fold + parameter-stability gates; OOS verdict is absolute on untouched config B. No Delta_NI in the governing gates (historical note only). Retention reason = FIDELITY TO THE FROZEN DESIGN, not a universal strictness ordering (absolute and non-inferiority test different claims).

D-PURGE.detail: Frozen 1700/850/850 boundaries NOT shifted. Deterministic within-window eligibility masks: a decision session is scored only when all required formation sessions AND the complete execution/holding/return-realization horizon lie within the SAME governed window. Formation exclusion 69 sessions at window start; realization = next-open + registered 5-session max hold.

S_min.detail: PASS requires net OOS Sharpe >= 0.70 (and all other gates). Diversifier 0.40 is a separately-reported classification tag DIVERSIFIER_TIER_MET, NOT a PASS route. 0.40 <= Sharpe < 0.70 => FAIL (confirmatory) + tag DIVERSIFIER_TIER_MET; Sharpe < 0.40 => FAIL.
